Specifies processor IDs, core dump structures, cron job timers, and firmware metadata.


## Files
- **[chip_id.h](chip_id.h.md)**: Specifies unique 2-bit IDs for processors to differentiate system logs and core dumps.
- **[core_dump_structs.h](core_dump_structs.h.md)**: Defines structures for core dump data, including thread info and extra registers, for BLE compatibility.
- **[cron.h](cron.h.md)**: Wall-clock based timer system for scheduling and managing cron jobs with DST handling.
- **[firmware_metadata.h](firmware_metadata.h.md)**: Defines the Firmware Metadata structure for identifying build information in .elf and .bin files.
